models.title: MNIST CNN
models.description: LeCun-style digit classifier. Tiny CNN over a 28×28 grayscale digit.

models.title: Super-Resolution
models.description: Sub-pixel CNN that 3× upsamples a low-res Y-channel image. Good for showing growing feature maps.

models.title: SqueezeNet 1.0
models.description: Compact ImageNet classifier with fire modules. Deeper, branchy graph — exercises the fusion + lane layout.
